data.summary: [Event Preview] New content, ‘Special Mission”, will begin on 6/21 (Tue)! Hidden stories that weren’
data.body:
[Event Preview]

New content, ‘Special Mission”, will begin on 6/21 (Tue)!
Hidden stories that weren’t told in the Main Story will be revealed through a new story and Quests, so please look forward to it!

#BlueArchive![2HlmqLFwPz18TSWQpVG6IA07xndU9Uor.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/2HlmqLFwPz18TSWQpVG6IA07xndU9Uor.jpg)


BlueArchive
@EN_BlueArchive
[Event Notice]

Work with Eimi and her Paranormal Research Club to discover secrets of Decagrammaton in ‘Special Mission Decagrammaton’! Live now!

🗓️Period: 6/20(Mon) 19:00 (UTC) – 7/5 (Tue) 03:00 (UTC)
Details: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/99136

#BlueArchive![98BJw37KQ6gFlGo7FgkzBPZL4NNLZWLc.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/98BJw37KQ6gFlGo7FgkzBPZL4NNLZWLc.jpg)
